title: desmodium supinum var. angustifolium
intro: Desmodium supinum var. angustifolium, commonly known as Narrowleaf Tick-trefoil, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Desmodium supinum var. angustifolium include its potential to alleviate symptoms of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and snake bites. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and poultices for topical application.
